reason: Quality Gate Module fully implemented with 8 comprehensive quality checks covering transcript validation, participant identification, and calendar matching. Score computation works correctly (averages individual checks with configurable 0.8 threshold). HITL escalation integrated via hitl.py with P0/P1/P2 priority levels. Manifest v3 quality_gate object updates correctly with pass/fail status, scores, check results, and advances status to 'gated' on success. SKILL.md documentation updated to reflect actual implementation.
